name: Next.js 项目规范
summary: Frontend Craft skill for Next.js 项目规范.
description: Use when creating or reviewing Next.js 14+ App Router projects, file routes, layouts, server/client component boundaries, SSR/SSG/ISR, streaming, metadata, middleware, server actions, or Next-specific data fetching. For generic client React component architecture, apply the project's React conventions separately; Chinese triggers include Next.js, App Router.

boundaryWorkflows: Use a React project workflow for generic client component architecture and hooks organization.
Use a route protection workflow for auth, RBAC, redirects, and middleware security boundaries.
Use a data-fetching workflow for client-side server state; keep Next server fetch and cache policy in the Next workflow.
